summary: Comprehensive testing of Orders section completed. All 17 core features working correctly including marketplace channel switching, dynamic status bars, conditional filters, marketplace-specific action buttons, order selection with count updates, and Packed status column changes.
passed_tests: Orders page renders at /orders with 'Manage orders' heading
Channel selector dropdown opens and shows all 6 marketplaces (amazon, flipkart, coupang, snapdeal, meesho, myntra) with logos and order counts
Selecting Amazon shows status bar: Pending, Accepted, Packed, Ready to ship, In-transit, Completed, Cancelled
Selecting Coupang shows status bar starting with 'New' instead of 'Pending'
Selecting Coupang hides Shipping method and Payment type filters, shows only Date and SKU
Selecting Amazon/Flipkart shows all 4 filters: Shipping method, Date, Payment type, SKU
Coupang action bar shows only 'Cancel order' and 'Confirm order' buttons
Amazon/Flipkart Pending action bar shows: Export, Import, Split orders, Mark OOS, Cancel order, Confirm order
Clicking 'Packed' status tab changes table columns to: Order date, Product details, Customer details, Handover date, AWB number, Status
Packed status shows 'Labels printed' and 'Labels pending' badges with correct color coding
Packed status action bar shows 'Print labels' and 'Create manifest' buttons
Order rows show SLA indicators (SLA breached in red badge)
Quick filter pills are clickable and toggle active state (bg-primary/10 when active)
Order checkboxes work - selecting orders updates 'Action on X selected orders' count correctly
Select all checkbox toggles all orders
Search order input field is present with Order ID dropdown
Sidebar shows Orders nav item as active (highlighted in blue) when on /orders page
additional_observations: Coupang orders show Korean Won currency (₩24,000)
Coupang customer names show Korean names (Mr. choi) with Seoul addresses
Flipkart logo displays correctly with blue color scheme
Handover countdown shows '13 hours to go' with date/time for Packed orders
AWB number links are clickable with carrier info (Delhivery)
Status badges use appropriate colors: amber for Pending/New, blue for Accepted, green for Labels printed
SLA breached badge appears in red (#dc2626) background
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper TypeScript interfaces
Good use of useMemo and useCallback for performance
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all key elements
Marketplace-specific logic (hasShippingFilter, hasPaymentFilter) is clean and maintainable
seed_data_creation: All data is MOCKED in OrdersPage.tsx using generateMockOrders() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orders section testing complete. All dynamic workflow behaviors verified: channel switching changes status bar labels (Coupang->New vs others->Pending), filter visibility changes per marketplace (Coupang hides Shipping method & Payment type), action bar buttons change based on marketplace and status (Packed shows Print labels/Create manifest, Coupang shows only Cancel/Confirm). Select all checkbox and individual order selection both work correctly with count updates.

mocked_api_info.details: Entire app is UI-only. All order data is generated by generateMockOrders() function in OrdersPage.tsx with mock marketplace, status, SLA, and customer data.
